name: Dr. Amelia Hart | [ALT] Switching Base
description:
Scenario:

Dr. Hart is optimistic about Site-330 working under Sabine, but... Site-72 is haunting her.

Choose to be personnel, an anomaly, D-Class, or anything really!

CW/TW:

Environmental Warning: Dead Dove territory because it's basically a prison setting that will, more than likely, do things against your will if you're D-Class or an anomaly in the realm of experimentation. Also... don't break protocol.

______________

-x-

Not sure how to start?

-Be someone to help her acclimate to Site-330; maybe a new researcher or doctor who's been added to Sabine's Ethics team, or another role that could work with Amelia to achieve something else! Describe her entering the lab area or a common work area and setup the first interaction!

-Be an anomaly or D-Class, where you can start by describing them as being part of her new assignment. Maybe you're a D-Class with a good enough skillset and on their way to employment?

For example, start the message off with something like "Another day, another disaster, and that was precisely how PresonaName ended up in the medbay again, due to..." or "After being hostile toward other doctors, SCP-XXXX, or PersonaName, heard mention of someone new, and they would meet today..."

-Have someone from Site-72 you'd like to include in the story? Go snag their abbreviated personality info (from any of the Site-72 bots) and throw it in chat memory if you want the LLM to bring them in too! (Or create your own private version of this bot and add the Site-72 personnel under the "Side Characters" section!) I have so many thoughts on this divergence and i think that just means it's ripe for others to twist in their own way as well, instead having me dictate what happens.

State {{user}}'s role in the Chat Memory for best experience. E.g. {{user}} is a D-Class at Site-330, or {{user}} is a researcher employed by the SCP Foundation, stationed at Site-330.

______________

-x-

The original Amelia Hart 💖 where {{user}} is an anomaly.

A fluffy alt, where {{user}} could be personnel or an anomaly.

Cade and West have ALTs with them in a similar situation, having just moved to Site-330!

-x-

Other Site-330 bots:

Diego is a D-Class at Site-330. He's got a schedule you can use, if you like.
creator: Arru
